Container.Name: lumina
Container.Overview: Lumina — audio transcription and summarization tool. Supports multiple engines (faster-whisper, whisper, canary, qwen-audio) with optional GPU acceleration. Requires the Nvidia-Driver plugin from Community Apps for GPU support.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the Lumina web interface and API.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Optional second port mapping for dedicated API access (e.g. expose to a different network). Leave blank to disable.

Config.Name: Models
Config.Description: Persistent storage for downloaded models (can be several GB).

Config.Name: Transcription Engine
Config.Description: Engine to use for transcription. Options: faster-whisper, whisper, canary, qwen-audio. Note: canary and qwen-audio require GPU and the :canary image tag.

Config.Name: Whisper Model Size
Config.Description: Model size for faster-whisper/whisper engines. Options: tiny, base, small, medium, large-v3, large-v3-turbo.

Config.Name: Canary Model
Config.Description: Model to use with the canary engine (requires :canary image tag).

Config.Name: Qwen Audio Model
Config.Description: Model to use with the qwen-audio engine.

Config.Name: Compute Type
Config.Description: Quantization type. Options: int8 (fastest), int8_float16, float16, float32.

Config.Name: Language
Config.Description: Transcription language code (e.g. en, es, fr, de). Leave blank for auto-detect.

Config.Name: API Key
Config.Description: Bearer token for programmatic API access. Set to a long random string. Pass as: Authorization: Bearer <key> or X-API-Key: <key>. Leave blank to disable API key auth.

Config.Name: Auth Enabled
Config.Description: Enable HTTP basic authentication for the web UI.

Config.Name: Auth Username
Config.Description: Username for basic authentication (only used when Auth Enabled is true).

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: Password for basic authentication (only used when Auth Enabled is true).
